title: Pale Garden Trader
description: This mod adds a Pale Garden Villager and Creaking Armor to the Game
body:
### This mod adds a Pale Garden Villager and Creaking Armor to the Game

The Pale Gardden Villager Trader can only be found in his new cabin, which spawns in pale garden biomes.

You can also summon him anywhere by placing his Traderblock Workstation (found in every cabin structure) next to a jobless villager.
![Pale Garden Trader Mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c98c1f61a357b371663384f981d7b74b9375730d.png)


**Pale Garden Trader:**

- Buys and sells Pale Garden related items.
- Sells a brand new Creaking Armor set for the player.
![Trader](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/634aebdcd238ebf3c1334c2440d927f3a2837fb4_0.webp)

 

**Creaking Armor:**

- Stats are similar to Diamond Armor.
- Wearing the full set grants the player the resistance effect.
- Can be repaired with Resin.
![Armor](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/276a3fd890417d725640c4743a0278b5407c5238.png)


 

You are free to include this mod in your modpacks

Made by Leonxkingx and Taknax
